meta.title: Sponsors & Partners · EFU
meta.description: Elite Fight Universe (EFU) sponsors stand behind our combat-sports talent search and gala series. Discover partnership tiers, integration options, and how to get in touch.

hero.title: Sponsors & Partners
hero.subtitle: Elite Fight Universe is proud of its partners
hero.intro: EFU partnership tiers are built to give sponsors tailored visibility across our galas, broadcasts and digital platforms. Every tier includes dedicated activations and visibility packages.

why.title: One platform, three formats, nine markets
why.intro: EFU runs a reality format, a gala series and a digital platform in parallel. Sponsors don't just back a single event — they join a year-long, integrated communications ecosystem.

audience.title: Our audience
items: Men and women aged 18–45 who actively follow combat sports
Central European reach: Hungary, Slovakia, Romania, Croatia, Serbia, Slovenia, Germany
A multilingual audience — the platform is available in 9 languages

values.title: Brand values
items: Performance and competition — we channel the spirit of sport
Community — we connect athletes, fans and partners

formats.title: Content formats
items: EFU Reality — multi-week talent search with episodes, backstage and challenges
EFU Fight Night — gala series, ranked matchups and championship bouts
EFU TV — live broadcasts, interviews, behind-the-scenes and short-form content

tiers.title: Partnership tiers
tiers.subtitle: Pick the tier that fits your brand. For custom packages and pricing, reach out via the Contact page and we'll send a tailored proposal.
tiers.currencyNote: Prices are indicative — every package is customizable.

bronze.name: Bronze
features: Logo placement on the EFU Sponsors page
Footer credit in social media posts (1–2 times per month)
Thank-you in the Reality credits
Access to the EFU sponsor newsletter

silver.name: Silver
features: Everything in the Bronze package
Logo in the EFU Fight Night broadcast credits
Pre-roll short spot before Reality episodes (1 per month)
Right to use a branded hashtag
EFU TV short interview / mention

gold.name: Gold
features: Everything in the Silver package
Logo on the ring-side mat and fight-card poster
Dedicated branded zone at the Fight Night venue
Product sample / display at the on-site activation booth
4 passes to one EFU Fight Night gala

reality.name: Reality Integration
reality.tagline: Your brand moves into the reality house
features: Product placement inside the reality house
Branded zone in the reality house (e.g. training corner, recovery area, kitchen island)
Sponsor-curated challenge for the contestants
Logo in the Reality credits with episode mentions
Exclusive social media activation across the brand's channels

fightNight.name: Fight Night Integration
features: Ringside branded placement (mat, apron, corner)
Sponsored fight card (title-sponsor or card-sponsor level)
Replay sponsorship — branded bumper during replays
Dedicated commentator mentions throughout the Fight Night broadcast
Participation across the full Fight Night season (3–4 galas)

integrations.title: Integration options
integrations.subtitle: Two main integration directions — Reality and Fight Night — which can also be combined.

realityItems.title: Product placement in the reality house
realityItems.body: Your products appear naturally in the everyday life of the reality house — from the kitchen counter to the gym.

realityItems.title: Branded zones
realityItems.body: Your own branded corner in the house: training pad, recovery area, chill-out corner, or anything that fits your brand.

realityItems.title: Sponsor-curated challenges
realityItems.body: Contestants compete in your challenge — the best performance is tied to your name.

realityItems.title: Episode mentions + credits
realityItems.body: Your logo appears in every episode, with a commentator mention before the relevant segment.

fightNightItems.title: Ringside placement
fightNightItems.body: Logo on the ring apron, the canvas and the corner — the camera always sees it, the audience always reads it.

fightNightItems.title: Sponsored fight card
fightNightItems.body: A whole fight card carries your name — from the teaser videos to the winner's interview.

fightNightItems.title: Replay sponsorship
fightNightItems.body: Branded bumpers during replays and analysis segments — premium attention at the key moments.

fightNightItems.title: Commentator mentions
fightNightItems.body: Dedicated segments about your brand throughout the broadcast — in the voice of the experts, true to the Fight Night spirit.

logos.title: Our partners
logos.subtitle: Once the first three sponsors sign on, their logos will appear here. Placeholder for now.
logos.placeholderNote: The logo wall fills up after the first three sponsors sign on.

contactCta.title: Join the EFU partner family
contactCta.body: Ask for a tailored proposal and let's discuss how your brand fits into the EFU ecosystem.
